sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἀνθρώπινος

- Transliteration: Anthropinos

- Phonetic: anth-ro'-pee-nos

- Definition:

1. human

a. applied to things belonging to men

- Origin: from G444

- TDNT entry: 07:06,6

- Part(s) of speech: Adjective

- Strong's: From G444; human: - human common to man man[-kind] [man-] kind men´ s after the manner of men.
